title: tyloglossa ciliata
intro: Tyloglossa ciliata, also known as the 'Balsam Apple', is a type of plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Tyloglossa ciliata include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health issues.
